title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.505 - Account of fees — supreme court
text:
483.505.  Account of fees — supreme court. — The clerk of the supreme court shall keep a true and accurate account of all fees earned in such clerk's office.
(RSMo 1939 § 13275, A.L. 1982 S.B. 497, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Prior revisions:  1929 § 11656; 1919 § 2102; 1909 § 2666 
Effective 7-01-97
